closeout_notes: Minor punch-list rework in final week; client signed off on first walkthrough.
Finished under budget; reused tested code blocks from prior line upgrade.
Extra ductwork sensors requested mid-project; absorbed within contingency.
Closed early; burner vendor delivered ahead of schedule.
Smooth commissioning; telemetry panel shipped pre-wired.
Camera lighting redesign after failed first acceptance test drove budget overrun.
Structural steel rework added unplanned controls hours; schedule held.
Plant shutdown window slipped two weeks; team waited on chiller isolation.
Robot reach issue found at FAT; regripper design added cost and hours.
Legacy drive cabinets not as documented; extensive rewire and retest.
AGV vendor firmware defects delayed site acceptance by six weeks.
Scope grew from four to seven compressors after kickoff; no change order raised.
